title: Bitcoin Analysis: The Setup Everyone Missed
author: ECKrown
summary_bullets: Bitcoin is nearing one of our major targets as it does play out the metinal setup from last week when Bitcoin was trading at 67,000 bucks 448 and change.
And now as we approach said targets, I do want to go over what essentially to expect next.
What this rally likely looks like and ultimately get into some traditional market action as well cuz there is one stock, one major thing that I did actually sell everything from.

I don't necessarily think that is necessarily doomed, but I do think that we've had the heart of the trade, especially if you were watching my long-term investment portfolio video from many months ago.
Uh there is one major change that I did make recently and also I want to focus on a few stocks, a few names that I am looking to accumulate during this Iranian war time.
Look, I'm not saying war is good.

I'm not saying that I'm happy about war, but when it comes to it, you know, there are moves to be made that do historically work out quite well in traditional markets and I want to be uh going over those essentially what I'm doing in traditions.
Then also maybe cover up the old options trade that we got going on too.
So, first things first, meta signals right here.
Did far off like I say when Bitcoin was trading at 67,448 and 20.
